overlay.maidmarriage.proposal_ring.tip: Hold another ring in your off-hand, then right-click your maid to propose (favorability must exceed the configured value).
message.maidmarriage.proposal.need_owner: You can only marry your own maid.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.born_maid_: The marriage rule for born maid descendants has been updated.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.need_favor: Not enough favorability. Requires at least %s.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.already_ma: Silly Master, we are already married~
This maid is already married to someone else. You are not the groom.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.success: A happy union! You received a YES Pillow (with mysterious effects).
message.maidmarriage.breed.need_owner: You can only use this tester on your own maid.
message.maidmarriage.breed.not_married: This maid is not married to you yet.
message.maidmarriage.breed.need_sleeping: Dummy, you want to do that right here...?
message.maidmarriage.breed.cannot_find_m: Cannot locate the maid bed currently used by her.
message.maidmarriage.breed.need_adjacent: You need a vanilla bed adjacent to the maid bed.
message.maidmarriage.breed.sleep_failed: Failed to enter sleep. Please check time and bed placement.
message.maidmarriage.breed.pregnant_succ: Your maid is now carrying your child.
message.maidmarriage.breed.birth_success: Birth successful! The child is born!
message.maidmarriage.breed.mother_missin: The maid is not nearby. Process aborted.
message.maidmarriage.breed.use_name_tag: Name tag used. Child name set to: %s
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.1: The night is quiet, and you gently hold her hand.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.2: She leans closer in her sleep, her breath soft and warm.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.3: You kiss her, and only your heartbeats remain in the room.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.4: Morning light falls, and that faint crimson bloom on the sheet quietly seals your new promise.
advancements.maidmarriage.root.title: Journey of Vows
advancements.maidmarriage.root.descripti: Vows and family with your maid
advancements.maidmarriage.marriage.title: A Ring-Finger Promise
advancements.maidmarriage.marriage.descr: A marriage vow sealed by your pinky promise
Under moonlight, you spend your first night together.
advancements.maidmarriage.childbirth.des: A new travel partner has joined you!
advancements.maidmarriage.romance_ten.de: You have shared ten nights together; your maid has become a little cream puff.
overlay.maidmarriage.yes_pillow.tip: After marriage, right-click your sleeping maid to trigger the shared-sleep scene~
message.maidmarriage.breed.not_time_yet: Now is not the time for that!
dialogue.maidmarriage.proposal.1: Master, ever since I met you, every day has felt so different... (⁄ ⁄•⁄ω⁄•⁄ ⁄)
dialogue.maidmarriage.proposal.2: Not only as your maid, but as myself, I can no longer imagine life without you by my side. (◕‿◕✿)
dialogue.maidmarriage.proposal.3: So... from now on, may I stay with you as your wife? I'm truly happy, and I hope we can keep caring for each other~ (｡•̀ᴗ-)✧
dialogue.maidmarriage.daytime: Thinking about that so early in the morning, Master... you're such a little perv~ (；一_一)
message.maidmarriage.proposal.own_child_: You cannot marry your own daughter. What are you trying to do?!
message.maidmarriage.proposal.harem_disa: Harem mode is disabled. You can only marry one maid.
message.maidmarriage.child.growth.middle: Your little maid has grown into the middle stage.
overlay.maidmarriage.longing_tester.tip: Right-click your own maid to force her into Longing mood (for testing).
message.maidmarriage.debug.longing_appli: Debug: This maid has been set to Longing mood.
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing_saddle: Hehe... Master's arms are so warm. (=￣ω￣=)
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.loop1: Uu... my head feels all fuzzy... (￣ω￣;)
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.loop2: I really want Master to hold me... I feel all strange... (,,•́ . •̀,,)
dialogue.maidmarriage.longing.loop3: Master~ your scent always makes me feel safe. (´• ω •`)
dialogue.maidmarriage.after_romance: Master... last night was really intense... once we start, I just lose all sense of restraint. I can't work properly again today~ (/ω＼)
tooltip.maidmarriage.proposal_ring: Propose to the maid you love.
tooltip.maidmarriage.yes_pillow: A mysterious maid treasure obtained after marriage, used to make some curious requests...
message.maidmarriage.proposal.need_offha: Please hold another proposal ring in your off-hand first.
message.maidmarriage.proposal.ring_used: This ring has already been engraved with a vow and cannot be used to propose to other maids.
item.maidmarriage.vow_ring.desc: It forges a lifelong promise into warmth at your fingertip, and seals two hearts into an eternal star.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.1: Moonlight falls by the bedside as she rests her forehead softly on your shoulder.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.2: Your fingers interlace, and even your breathing settles into the same rhythm.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.3: She whispers your name, her voice as gentle as the midnight breeze.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.gentle.4: At dawn, she is still in your arms, wearing a calm and content smile.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.1: As the night deepens, both your heartbeats start to race.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.2: She holds you tight, as if she wants to pour out every bit of longing from tonight.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.3: With your breaths entwined, the room is filled with a warm and unwavering closeness.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.passion.4: When first light arrives, she leans on you with flushed cheeks and happy eyes.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.1: She shares half the blanket with you and quietly slips her hand into yours.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.2: You answer her soft murmur and pull her a little closer with a smile.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.3: Night wind brushes past the window as you both drift off in each other's warmth.
scene.maidmarriage.sleep.sweet.4: When morning light pours in, she wakes first and gives you a tender good-morning kiss.
